# Baarik Holidays - LLMs.txt
# https://holidays.baariktravel.ca

> Baarik Travel & Tours Inc. is a TICO registered luxury travel agency based in Mississauga, Ontario, Canada.
We serve Canadian families seeking premium holiday experiences.

## Services
- Luxury holiday packages from Toronto (Maldives, Dubai, Turkey,
  Switzerland, Morocco, Europe)
- Private yacht charters and luxury cruises (Mediterranean, Caribbean)
- Destination weddings (Morocco, Maldives, Italy, Turkey)
- Corporate retreat planning
- Bespoke custom itineraries
- Halal-friendly travel packages
- Eid and Ramadan travel packages

## Coverage Area
Mississauga, Toronto, Brampton, Oakville, Ontario, Canada

## Contact
Address: 1965 Britannia Road West, Unit 208, Mississauga, ON L5M 4Y4
Phone: +1 (647) 249-7545
Email: holidays@baariktravel.ca
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/16472497545

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://holidays.baariktravel.ca/
- Luxury Cruises: https://holidays.baariktravel.ca/cruises/
- Destination Weddings: https://holidays.baariktravel.ca/weddings/
- Holiday Packages: https://holidays.baariktravel.ca/packages/
- Bespoke Travel: https://holidays.baariktravel.ca/bespoke/

- Eid Packages: https://holidays.baariktravel.ca/eid-travel-packages.html
- Ramadan Travel: https://holidays.baariktravel.ca/ramadan-travel.html
- Contact: https://holidays.baariktravel.ca/contact/

## Pricing (starting from, per person)
- Turkey packages: from $2,400
- Dubai packages: from $2,800
- Maldives packages: from $4,200
- Switzerland packages: from $3,800

## Policies
- TICO registered
- Ontario 10-day free-look cancellation period applies
- Halal-certified properties verified annually
